title: opportunity record
description: ADVISORY quest-local discovery ledger entry: 'what to try next and why', grounded in this quest's evidence. record_id = opportunity_id; upsert lets status advance (open -> addressed/dropped/superseded). NOT a gate (no validator flag, never blocks). QUEST-LOCAL ONLY: motivating_refs cite finding/result/claim ids of THIS quest; there is no cross-quest/global/shared discovery memory.

quest_id.description: owning quest; REQUIRED — opportunities are quest-local

rationale.description: why this is worth trying, grounded in evidence

motivating_refs.description: quest-local evidence that motivates this opportunity, e.g. {finding:[...], result:[...], claim:[...]}; ids must belong to THIS quest (no cross-quest refs).

attempt_signature.description: OPTIONAL coarse signature for ADVISORY quest-local repeated-failure detection (idea_key, method_key, dataset, metric, parameter_key, baseline_id, condition, route, notes). Compared against dropped opportunities / refuted claims / negative-boundary evidence / lesson findings of THIS quest. Never a validation requirement and never blocks.
